title: Reusable resources should be initialized at construction time of lambda functions
description: This rule checks if resources are properly initialized at the construction time of AWS Lambda functions.
message: Resources should be initialized at the time of function creation.
impact: Potential function startup time and resource usage inefficiencies.
recommendation: Initialize reusable resources at the time of function creation.

noncompliant.description: Database connection is created conditionally inside the lambda function.

compliant.description: Database connection is properly initialized during function creation.

why_is_this_an_issue: Conditionally creating resources inside the function increases startup time and may lead to inconsistent resource usage.
how_to_fix: Initialize reusable resources at the time of function creation.

metadata.title: Reusable resources should be initialized at construction time of lambda functions
